title: Seating system
abstract: A seating system, a beam of the seating system and a connector to a beam of the seating system. The seating system includes: a beam (30); at least one seat (10) mountable to the beam (30); a first connector (21) to connect the seat to an upper portion of the beam (30); and a second connector (51) to connect a lower portion of the beam (30) to a beam support (50) mountable to a floor or a riser. At least one of the first and second connectors (21, 51) is connectable to the beam by at least one clamping member (22, 24) having at least two groove or ridge formations. The beam (30) includes at least two complementary ridge or groove formations on a respective upper or lower portion to be engaged by the at least one clamping member (22, 24) of the connector (21, 51).
claims:
Claims CLAIMS: 1 . A seating system, including: a beam; at least one seat mountable to the beam; a first connector for connecting the seat to an upper portion of the beam; and a second connector for connecting a lower portion of the beam to a beam support which is mountable to a floor or a riser; wherein at least one of the first and second connectors is connectable to a respective one of the upper or lower portions of the beam by at least one clamping member having at least two groove or ridge formations engageable with at least two complementary ridge or groove formations provided on said respective one of the upper or lower portions of the beam. 2. A seating system according to claim 1 , wherein the first connector is connectable to the upper portion of the beam by at least one clamping member having at least two groove or ridge formations engageable with complementary ridge or groove formations provided on the upper portion of the beam, and the second connector is connectable to a lower portion of the beam by at least one clamping member having at least two groove or ridge formations engageable with complementary ridge or groove formations provided on the lower portion of the beam. 3. A seating system according to claim 1 or claim 2, wherein the first connector has a first clamping member connected to a seat support and having at least two grooves or ridges engageable with at least two complementary ridges or grooves provided on a rear surface of the upper portion of the beam, and a second clamping member connectable to the first clamping member and having at least two grooves or ridges engageable with at least two complementary ridges or grooves provided on a front surface of the upper portion of the beam. 4. A seating system according to any one of claims 1 to 3, wherein the second connector has a first clamping member connected to a beam support mount and having at least two grooves engageable with at least two complementary ridges provided on a rear surface of the lower portion of the beam, and a second clamping member connectable to the second clamping member and having at least two grooves engageable with at least two complementary ridges provided on a front surface of the lower portion of the beam. 5. A beam for use in the seating system of any one of claims 1 to 4, including: an upper portion; and a lower portion; wherein the upper portion has an upper surface and front and rear upper side surfaces, and the lower portion has a lower surface and front and rear lower side surfaces, the upper portion having at least two ridge or groove formations on at least one of its front and rear upper side surfaces for engagement with complementary groove or ridge formations of a clamping member of a seat connector, and the lower portion having at least two ridge or groove formations on at least one of its front and rear lower side surfaces for engagement with complementary groove or ridge formations of a clamping member of a second connector. 6. A seating system according to any one of claims 1 to 4, or a beam according to claim 5, wherein the upper portion of the beam has at least two ridge or groove formations on both of its front and rear upper side surfaces, and the lower portion has at least two ridge or groove formations on both of its front and rear lower side surfaces. 7. A seating system or a beam according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the upper and lower portions of the beam form a unitary construction with 

 the front and rear upper side surfaces of the upper portion contiguous with the respective front and rear lower side surfaces of the lower portion. 8. A seating system or a beam according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the upper portion of the beam has a substantially flat top surface. 9. A seating system or a beam according to any one of claims 1 to 7 wherein the upper portion of the beam has a curved top surface. 10. A seating system or a beam according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the upper surface of the beam slopes downwardly from the rear to the front of the beam. 1 1 . A seating system or a beam according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the upper portion of the beam has at least two ridges on its front upper side surface. 12. A seating system or a beam according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the upper portion of the beam has at least two ridges on its rear upper side surface. 13. A seating system or a beam according to claim 1 1 or claim 12, wherein a first ridge of the at least two ridges on its front and/or rear upper side surface is provided at a front or rear edge of a top surface of the beam, and a second one of the at least two ridges on its front and/or rear upper side surface is provided spaced from and below said first ridge. 14. A connector for use in the seating system of claim 1 , comprising a first clamping member having an engagement portion including at least two groove or ridge formations which, in use, engage complementary ridge or groove formations on a front surface of a beam, and a second clamping member having an engagement portion including at least two groove or ridge formations which, in 

 use, engage complementary ridge or groove formations on a rear surface of a beam. 15. A connector according to claim 14, wherein each clamping member of the connector has at least two grooves for engagement with complementary shaped ridges on a front or rear surface of a beam. 16. A connector according to claim 14 or claim 15, wherein the clamping members of the connector are made from two or more pieces that attach to one another to form the connector. 17. A connector according to claim 16, wherein the clamping members of the connector are adapted to be attached together by fastening means, such as a bolt and nut arrangement. 18. A seat connector comprising a connector according to any one of claims 14 to 17, wherein at least one of the first and second clamping members is connected to a seat support. 19. A beam support connector comprising a connector according to any one of claims 14 to 17, wherein at least one of the first and second clamping members is connected to a beam support mount for mounting a beam to a floor or riser.
